news.headline: Santander plans to reduce risk exposure by adopting a "capital-light" model. #finance #banking
New tool by Bloomberg helps investors evaluate exposure to nature and biodiversity risks. #Investing #RiskAssessment
news.summary: Bloomberg has introduced a new tool designed to aid investors in evaluating their susceptibility to risks associated with nature and biodiversity. This tool aims to provide investors with insights into their exposure levels related to natural resources, ecosystems, and biodiversity concerns. By utilizing this solution, investors will have a better understanding of the potential financial impacts these risks may pose to their portfolios. This initiative by Bloomberg is crucial as the global economy continues to grapple with environmental challenges. Investors can now utilize this tool to analyze and potentially mitigate the risks associated with nature and biodiversity, ensuring a more sustainable and environmentally conscious approach to investment decisions.

news.headline: Entrata introduces Procure to Pay and Homebody Rewards to enhance property management, boost efficiency, and resident engagement.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City, Entrata, a prominent multifamily Operating System (OS) powered by AI, unveiled two innovative products geared towards enhancing property management operations and enhancing resident satisfaction. The newly introduced Procure to Pay and Homebody Rewards aim to streamline procurement and payment procedures and incentivize resident involvement, respectively. The Procure to Pay tool simplifies purchasing and payment workflows, whereas Homebody Rewards incentivizes resident engagement through rewards that promote extended stay and operational efficiency. These additions are part of Entrata's efforts to optimize property management, with the goal of boosting efficiency and resident experience.

news.headline: House price growth is slowing, lowest in over a year. First American Data & Analytics reports in September 2024 HPI.
news.summary: First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation, has recently published its September 2024 Home Price Index (HPI) report. This report, which provides property-centric information, risk management, and valuation solutions, offers insights into home price changes nationally, at the state level, and in metropolitan areas. The data is updated less than four weeks behind real-time and includes price tiers for different metropolitan areas. This report is a valuable resource for tracking the housing market, particularly for analysts, investors, and individuals interested in real estate trends.

news.headline: Arlo Technologies to discuss Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024, at 5:00 p.m. ET. Conference call with investors and analysts.
news.summary: Arlo Technologies, Inc., a prominent smart home security firm traded on the NYSE under ARLO, disclosed plans to conduct a conference call for investors and analysts on November 7, 2024, at 5:00 p.m. ET (2:00 p.m. PT) to review its third quarter 2024 performance. The official report for the third quarter will be shared on the same day after the market closes. Interested individuals can participate in the live audio call by dialing the toll-free number that will be provided closer to the date of the call.

news.headline: Houston-The Woodlands-Sugar Land home prices rose by 1.6% YoY in September per First American Data & Analytics report.
news.summary: In Santa Ana, California, First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), has unveiled its September 2024 Home Price Index (HPI) report. This report provides up-to-date information on property values, risk assessment, and valuation solutions. It tracks home price fluctuations at a national, state, and metropolitan level, including Core-Based Statistical Areas, with data available for different price tiers. This data is less than four weeks behind real-time market conditions.

news.headline: Atlanta-Sandy Springs-Alpharetta home prices hold steady in Sept 2024 year over year, per First American HPI report.
news.summary: In Santa Ana, California, First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), has issued its September 2024 Home Price Index (HPI) report. This report provides property-centric data on home price changes nationally, statewide, and at the metropolitan level (Core-Based Statistical Area). It includes information on metropolitan price tiers and is updated less than four weeks behind real-time data.

news.headline: Los Angeles-Long Beach-Glendale home prices rose 2.0% year over year in Sep. First American Data & Analytics report.
news.summary: In Santa Ana, California, First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), has unveiled its September 2024 Home Price Index (HPI) report. The report, a comprehensive analysis of property-centric data, risk management, and valuation solutions, provides insights into home price fluctuations on a national, state, and metropolitan level, including Core-Based Statistical Areas. This report offers timely information, tracking home price variations closely in near real time.

news.headline: Dallas-Plano-Irving home prices up 1.8% year over year in September, according to First American Data & Analytics.
news.summary: First American Data & Analytics, a division of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), based in Santa Ana, California, has published its September 2024 Home Price Index (HPI) report. This report provides information on property values and risk assessment. The data is nearly real-time, covering national, state, and metropolitan (Core-Based Statistical Area) levels. It also includes price tiers for various metropolitan areas. This report is a significant tool for monitoring and analyzing home price changes.

news.headline: Beacon to release Q3 2024 earnings on Oct 30, 2024; earnings call on Oct 31, 2024 at 8:30am Eastern Time. #BECN #FinancialResults
news.summary: Beacon (Nasdaq: BECN) revealed that it will disclose its earnings report for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2024, subsequent to the market closure on Wednesday, October 30, 2024. A conference call and webcast discussing the financial outcomes will be conducted at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on October 31, 2024. Interested parties, analysts, and investors can register to participate in the earnings call and access the presentation slides on the Company’s website.

news.headline: Building Transparency and KieranTimberlake are collaborating on creating Tally 2.0, the next version of tallyLCA tool for analyzing environmental impact of materials.
news.summary: A nonprofit organization called Building Transparency in Seattle has revealed its plans to launch Tally® 2.0, the updated version of the tallyLCA tool, in partnership with KieranTimberlake. This new tool aims to offer open access data and resources for a more sustainable building future. It will focus on analyzing the environmental footprint of materials and various building designs, supporting the construction sector. Building Transparency's initiative to develop Tally 2.0 signifies a step forward in promoting eco-friendly practices in construction.

news.headline: U.S. mortgage demand plummets with a 17% decline as rates spike above 6.5%, the steepest drop in four years.
news.summary: The demand for mortgages in the U.S. experienced a significant decline, with a 17% drop in mortgage applications in the week ending Oct. 11. This marks the largest weekly decrease since April 2020 when the COVID-19 pandemic began. The Mortgage Bankers Association (MBA) reported this steep decline, attributing it to a sudden increase in interest rates that surprised homebuyers. Affordability concerns led many potential buyers to step back from the market. This decline follows a 5.1% drop in the previous week, making it the third consecutive week of decreasing mortgage applications. Mortgage rates have climbed to their highest levels since August, further impacting the housing market.

news.headline: Healthcasts appoints Max Baumer, CPA, as COO & CFO. Baumer brings 10+ yrs of finance experience to the role.
news.summary: In an announcement made today, Healthcasts, the prominent online platform for healthcare professionals to seek consultation and share real-world insights, revealed the selection of Max Baumer, CPA, for the roles of Chief Operating Officer and Chief Financial Officer. Baumer, with more than ten years of experience managing financial and operational aspects for rapidly expanding organizations such as major hospital systems and healthcare staffing firms, brings valuable expertise in integrating financial and operational functions.

news.headline: EchoMark introduces invisible image watermarking for maximum security, preventing leaks. Advanced visual content protection from leaks.
news.summary: A company based in Kirkland, Washington has developed a groundbreaking invisible watermarking technology for images known as EchoMark. This technology provides unparalleled protection against leaks and is considered the most secure method for sharing images.

news.headline: Truckload freight demand growing, rates rising in September - DAT: Van TVI: 271 down 7%, Reefer TVI: 208 down 7%, Flatbed TVI: 272 down 2%
news.summary: In Beaverton, Oregon, the DAT Freight & Analytics reported an increase in truckload freight volumes and rates in September, indicating a rise in the typical cyclical demand for truckload capacity. The DAT Truckload Volume Index (TVI) for van, refrigerated ("reefer"), and flatbed freight saw seasonal declines last month. The Van TVI dropped to 271, a 7% decrease from the previous month. Similarly, the Reefer TVI fell to 208, down by 7%, and the Flatbed TVI decreased to 272, showing a 2% decline. This data suggests a growing demand for truckload capacity in the market.

news.headline: Abbott Labs beats Q3 earnings, led by medical devices, stock dips slightly.
news.summary: Abbott Laboratories reported Q3 earnings that exceeded expectations, driven by solid organic sales growth led by medical devices. The company's stock experienced a slight decline following the announcement.

news.headline: Hims & Hers stock is up 22% this week due to FDA's approval of compounded version of Lilly's drug, but faces risk now.
news.summary: Hims stock has surged by nearly 22% this week following the FDA's announcement permitting compounded versions of Lilly's obesity drug. The rise in Hims' shares reflects investor optimism. However, concerns have arisen regarding the sustainability of this upward trend.

news.headline: General Motors invests $625M in Lithium Americas' Thacker Pass project, boosting LAC stock.
news.summary: General Motors has pledged an additional $625 million to Lithium Americas for advancing its Thacker Pass mine in Nevada. This funding boost has caused a surge in LAC stock.

news.headline: Clinical labs must achieve Phase One FDA LDT compliance by May 2025 deadline, securing critical LDTs in 5 months.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, many clinical laboratories are facing pressure to achieve Phase One compliance with the Food and Drug Administration's LDT rule before the May 2025 deadline. Labs conducting LDTs are urged to act swiftly to safeguard their critical LDTs, which play a key role in enhancing patient care and securing significant reimbursements. The labs offering LDTs are in a high-stakes scenario as they have a mere five months to protect their most valuable LDTs. Assistance is available for labs seeking to understand the requirements and navigate this challenging process.

news.headline: Workato releases report on automation's impact on workplace connectivity and creativity, surveying 1,000 knowledge workers in US and UK.
news.summary: A study conducted by Workato®, a prominent enterprise orchestration platform, revealed insightful trends in the automation sector. The research report, Automate to Elevate, commissioned by Sago, focused on surveying 1,000 knowledge-based workers in the United States and the United Kingdom. It highlighted the extended benefits of automation, going beyond enhancing productivity and efficiency. The findings indicate that automation not only saves time but also fosters collaboration, boosts creativity, and propels growth. This report sheds light on how automation can revolutionize work dynamics and empower workers.

news.headline: Bison Commerce in Chicago secures investment, introduces supplier portal, prepares for growth.
news.summary: Chicago-based Bison Commerce has successfully secured a significant investment, as it launches a supplier portal to enhance its operations and prepare for its forthcoming growth phase. With this development, the company is positioned to expand its reach and capitalize on emerging opportunities in the market.

news.headline: Modivcare Inc. (Nasdaq: MODV) to report Q3 2024 results on Nov 6, 2024, with a conference call scheduled on Nov 7 at 8:30.
news.summary: In Denver, Modivcare Inc. (Nasdaq: MODV), a healthcare services company specializing in integrated care solutions, is set to release its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on November 6, 2024. The report will cover the period ending September 30, 2024, with the announcement coming after the market closes. A conference call is scheduled for November 7, 2024, at 8:30 AM.

news.headline: Hansae from South Korea acquires US textile company Texollini to enhance presence in Central America and boost synthetic fiber capabilities.
news.summary: A South Korean-based global fashion ODM company, Hansae, has recently acquired Texollini in a strategic move to enhance its operations in Central America. This acquisition aims to bolster its presence in the region and advance its capabilities in synthetic fiber technologies. Hansae's acquisition of Texollini is a significant step towards expansion and innovation, marking a notable development in the company's growth strategy.

news.headline: Latin media and artists honor 25 years of Promesa y Esperanza®, raising support for St. Jude Children’s Hospital. A-listers Fey, Helen Ochoa, Jacqie Rivera, Mario Bautista among attendees.
news.summary: In Memphis, TN, celebrities, content creators, and Spanish-language media members came together to mark the 25th anniversary of Promesa y Esperanza® as they supported the vital cause of St. Jude Children’s Research Hospital®: Finding cures. Saving children.® The event saw the presence of renowned artists including Fey, Helen Ochoa, Jacqie Rivera, “Oscar” Ivan Treviño, and Mario Bautista, alongside iconic Latin boy band Menudo, Jesus Diaz (Chef Yisus), and content creators Ivan Emilio Albino, Ezequial. The gathering aimed to raise awareness and funds for the hospital's mission.

news.headline: Okta and OpenID Foundation collaborate with tech firms to create new identity security standard for SaaS apps. Form working group with Ping Identity, Microsoft, SGNL, and Beyond Identity. Goal is to establish Interoperability Profile for Secure Identity in the Enterprise. Vision to provide framework for SaaS companies to enhance product security.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Okta and the OpenID Foundation have joined forces to launch an OpenID Foundation working group. This collaboration includes Ping Identity, Microsoft, SGNL, and Beyond Identity. Together, they aim to establish the Interoperability Profile for Secure Identity in the Enterprise (IPSIE), a pioneering identity security standard. The goal of IPSIE is to create a universal framework, enabling SaaS companies to bolster the security of their offerings comprehensively. This initiative seeks to enhance security across all facets of SaaS products.

news.headline: Walmart Business partners with Fiserv to offer Clover platform to SMBs, nonprofits, aiming to save time and money.
news.summary: Walmart Business in Bentonville, Arkansas has revealed a new partnership with Clover, a top business management platform for small to medium-sized businesses (SMBs) from Fiserv. This collaboration aims to provide customers with enhanced solutions. Walmart Business continues to prioritize assisting businesses and nonprofits in saving time, money, and hassle through offering essential products and services. This initiative reflects Walmart Business's dedication to supporting SMBs.

news.headline: GoodRx partners with Affirm for pay-over-time option at participating pharmacies like Hy-Vee.
news.summary: In San Francisco, GoodRx, a prominent prescription savings platform in the U.S., disclosed that consumers can now utilize Affirm for making payments over time for specific medications at participating retail pharmacies. This new payment option on the GoodRx platform offers added convenience for customers. The program is being introduced in collaboration with partner pharmacies like Hy-Vee, a grocery retailer with an extensive network of over 275 retail pharmacy outlets. This initiative aims to improve accessibility and affordability for consumers seeking essential medications.

news.headline: Prolucent gets investment from Northwell Holdings to boost healthcare innovation, leading workforce management.
news.summary: A notable healthcare workforce optimization software and services company, Prolucent ®, has disclosed a valuable alliance with Northwell Holdings, which serves as the investment division of Northwell Health, the primary healthcare provider and largest private employer in New York State. This recent funding injection is a significant extension of Series A funding with the intention to further propel the growth and advancement of Prolucent’s platform that is powered by artificial intelligence (AI). This development comes subsequent to Northwell Health's initial positive outcomes from utilizing Prolucent’s services.

news.headline: Antavo introduces Timi AI, an AI agent based on analyst Timi Garai, aiding loyalty programs through video chat.
news.summary: Antavo, the Loyalty Platform with AI capabilities, has introduced Timi AI, an innovative AI agent modeled after their senior business analyst, Timi Garai. This AI assistant aids in loyalty program development through live video chats with clients. Leveraging Antavo's extensive industry expertise, interacting with Timi AI simulates a conversation with a knowledgeable colleague. Timi AI marks a significant advancement for Antavo as a leader in loyalty program technology.

news.headline: Three Oregon companies honored by U.S. Chamber of Commerce for innovation, growth, and community impact: DTOCS, IRL Social Skills, Rentec Direct.
news.summary: In Washington, DTOCS, IRL Social Skills, and Rentec Direct have been honored by the U.S. Chamber of Commerce for their innovation, growth, and community impact. The recognition highlights their achievements on a national level in the field of property management. This acknowledgment underscores the importance of their contributions to the industry, showcasing their commitment to excellence in driving change and making a positive difference.

news.headline: 10 teams advance to Semifinalist Round of Milken-Motsepe Prize in FinTech, receiving $100,000 each for financial inclusion solutions.
news.summary: In Washington, the Milken Institute and the Motsepe Foundation have revealed the 10 teams progressing to the Semifinalist Round of the Milken-Motsepe Prize in FinTech. Each successful team will be granted $100,000 in funding. The initiative, in response to a worldwide application appeal, aims to back creative endeavors that enhance accessibility to essential financial tools in emerging and frontier markets. The Semifinalists are set to engage in an Innovation Showcase hosted at the Milken Institute’s Middle, highlighting their groundbreaking solutions.

news.headline: Sandbox VR partners with Bokksu to release exclusive Japan Crate snack box at US corporate locations for Deadwood PHOBIA game.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Sandbox VR, a top virtual reality gaming company, has collaborated with Bokksu, a prominent Japanese snack and gifts brand, to launch a unique Japan Crate snack box. The "Feed Your Fears" crate can be found solely at Sandbox VR's U.S. corporate locations. This launch coincides with the introduction of their latest VR encounter, Deadwood PHOBIA. Deadwood PHOBIA is Sandbox VR's ninth immersive virtual reality experience and the third in their lineup.

news.headline: SentinelOne introduces Singularity Hyperautomation, AI SIEM, and Purple AI. Revolutionizing SOC with AI, aimed at reducing risk and speeding decision-making. #AI #cybersecurity
news.summary: SentinelOne, a major player in AI-driven cybersecurity based in Mountain View, California, and Las Vegas, launched a set of new advancements to realize the concept of the Autonomous Security Operations Center (SOC). These innovations, developed on the Singularity™ platform, enable security professionals to transform their approach to tackling new threats. By leveraging these tools, security leaders can minimize risk, accelerate response times, and enhance decision-making processes significantly. SentinelOne is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol S, and these cutting-edge solutions mark a significant step forward in cybersecurity technology.

news.headline: Southern Glazer’s Wine & Spirits launches Compliance Distilled, a digital resource for employees to maintain ethical standards.
news.summary: Southern Glazer's has introduced Compliance Distilled, a new digital resource designed to assist employees in upholding the utmost ethical and legal standards. The platform provides essential tools necessary for ensuring compliance.

news.headline: ICSC predicts 3-3.5% growth in holiday retail sales, reaching $1.66T; 6% food-and-beverage sales rise; 241 million shoppers planned - up by 6M from 2023.
news.summary: Retail sales during the upcoming holiday season in 2024 are predicted to rise between 3.0% to 3.5%, according to ICSC's holiday shopping forecast. The forecast also anticipates a significant 6.0% growth in food-and-beverage sales. The total expected expenditure for the season is set to reach $1.66 trillion. Additionally, ICSC's Annual Holiday Shopping Intentions Survey revealed that 241 million individuals, which accounts for 92% of consumers, intend to make purchases this year. This figure marks an increase of six million from the previous year, indicating high consumer interest in holiday shopping.

news.headline: General Assembly and Upwork collaborate to connect skilled tech talent to freelance opportunities in NY.
news.summary: In New York, a collaboration between General Assembly and Upwork is set to connect General Assembly graduates with companies seeking tech-savvy professionals. The partnership aims to provide opportunities for alumni to showcase their skills and expertise to potential employers on the platform. This initiative is expected to facilitate the recruitment of skilled tech talent, benefiting both parties involved.

news.headline: Hot Wheels launches "Challenge Accepted" platform to empower kids with growth mindset through play. #Mattel #HotWheels
news.summary: Toy and family entertainment company Mattel, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAT) unveiled a new initiative through its Hot Wheels® brand known as Challenge Accepted. This platform is designed to inspire children to embrace a growth mindset by encouraging them to engage in play that involves attempting, failing, persevering, and evolving. Hot Wheels® aims to foster resilience and a sense of empowerment in kids, fueling their challenger spirit. Mattel, Inc. is recognized for its extensive brand portfolio and global presence in the toy industry.

news.headline: Dine Brands Global, Inc. (NYSE: DIN) to release Q3 2024 earnings on Nov 6. Conference call at 9:00 am ET.
news.summary: Dine Brands Global, Inc., the company behind popular restaurants Applebee's, IHOP, and Fuzzy’s Taco Shop, will release its third quarter 2024 financial results on November 6, 2024, prior to the stock market opening. Along with this, they will conduct a conference call at 9:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day to review the financial results and discuss the business outlook. The parent company's stock is listed on NYSE with the ticker symbol DIN.

news.headline: Save A Lot partners with Leevers Supermarkets to target Hispanic consumers, launching Ahorra Mucho in Aurora, CO.
news.summary: A collaboration has been established between Save A Lot and Leevers Supermarkets to create innovative grocery formats and offerings to cater to Hispanic customers nationwide. This partnership led to the launch of Ahorra Mucho, a new discount grocery store and innovation hub in Aurora, Colorado. Save A Lot, a prominent discount grocery chain, aims to better serve a diverse customer base by introducing this concept. The store is designed to appeal to a wide range of Hispanic shoppers and is part of ongoing efforts to enhance the shopping experience.

news.headline: Rite Aid now offers Pay in 4 option in partnership with Klarna for flexible purchase management in all stores.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, Rite Aid, a top pharmacy retailer in the US, has revealed a fresh collaboration with Klarna, an AI-driven global payments network and shopping helper. This partnership introduces the Pay in 4 payment choice to Rite Aid customers, enabling them greater flexibility in handling their transactions at all Rite Aid stores. The aim is to improve the in-store shopping experience by providing modern, flexible services to simplify everyday shopping for consumers. Jeanniey Walden expressed, "We are dedicated to enhancing the shopping experience by making it simpler and more accessible."

news.headline: Qualcomm (NASDAQ: QCOM) declares $0.85 quarterly cash dividend per share, payable on Dec 19, 2024, to stockholders on record as of Dec 5, 2024.
news.summary: Qualcomm Incorporated (NASDAQ: QCOM) revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.85 per common share. The payment is slated for December 19, 2024, for stockholders noted at the close of business on December 5, 2024. Qualcomm is renowned for its innovative approaches in providing intelligent computing solutions worldwide, aiding in overcoming crucial challenges. The company's Snapdragon® branded platforms play a pivotal role in driving transformations in various industries.

news.headline: Miro integrates with Adobe Express allowing users to create professional content in the innovation workspace.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Miro®, a leading workspace for innovation, has unveiled the integration of Adobe Express into its platform, marking a significant expansion of its ecosystem. Adobe Express, a robust design tool renowned for creating top-tier creative content, is now accessible to users within Miro. This collaboration signifies a strategic move to empower individuals across all skill levels within organizations to craft exceptional content and streamline creative campaigns directly through the platform. This partnership aims to enhance creativity and productivity for users, creating a seamless experience in content creation.

news.headline: Breast Cancer Canada urges faster access to approved treatments as delays up to 2 years impact patients.
news.summary: Breast Cancer Canada (BCC), a leading national charity focused on advancing breast cancer research, is urging for expedited access to new treatments. The approval process currently spans up to two years, resulting in patients having to wait for potentially life-saving therapies. Swift access to innovative treatments is crucial for those combating aggressive breast cancer types, heightening the urgency to address the current delays. BCC is advocating for quicker approval processes to ensure timely access to effective treatments, given the pressing need for improved outcomes and saved lives.

news.headline: Levi Strauss & Co. aims for Net Zero emissions by 2050 with a roadmap to reduce greenhouse gas emissions by 2030.
news.summary: Levi Strauss & Co. (LS&Co.) unveiled their first climate transition plan in San Francisco today, outlining key targets for reducing greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions. The plan includes a goal of achieving a near-term GHG emissions reduction target by 2030 and becoming a Net Zero company by 2050. These commitments are recognized as the top-tier in emissions reduction efforts within the corporate world, demonstrating LS&Co.'s dedication to investors, value chain partners, supporters, and stakeholders.

news.headline: Humana Foundation awards $15.2M in grants for emotional health and nutrition programming in Kentucky, Florida, Louisiana, and Texas.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky, The Humana Foundation, affiliated with Humana Inc. (NYSE: HUM) for over four decades, unveiled grants for 2024 to advance its health equity mission. Valued at $15.2 million, the investment will benefit regions such as Kentucky, Florida, Louisiana, and Texas, aiding seniors and school-aged children to lead healthy, connected lives. As part of this initiative, Older Adult Technology Services (OATS) will be granted $2.5 million.

news.headline: Sparkle to partner with Liberty Networks and Gold Data in new pan-regional subsea cable system in Latin America & Caribbean.
news.summary: A major infrastructure and enterprise connectivity provider in Latin America and the Caribbean, Liberty Networks, a part of Liberty Latin America (LLA), has partnered with Gold Data, a telecommunications technology company specializing in international connectivity in the Caribbean and Latin America. The collaboration includes Sparkle, a prominent player in the submarine cable sector with a significant presence in the Americas, who will join as a new partner. This strategic alliance aims to enhance connectivity services in the region and expand their reach within the industry.

news.headline: Texas cannabis brand, Hometown Hero, launches sugar-free THC gummies with 25mg Delta-9 THC and live rosin, meeting health-conscious demand.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Hometown Hero, a leading producer of premium hemp-based cannabis goods, has revealed their newest creation: sugar-free edibles. These gummies are infused with 25mg of Delta-9 THC and live rosin, offering a unique blend for consumers. Made with allulose, a natural sweetener, these products cater to health-conscious individuals seeking cannabis items. This marks the company's initial venture into the sugar-free gummy market, addressing the increasing demand for diverse cannabis options.

news.headline: Chief partners with Wharton School to provide executive education to senior women executives, enhancing leadership skills.
news.summary: In New York today, Chief, the leading network of senior women executives, revealed a fresh collaboration with the Aresty Institute of Executive Education at the Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania. This partnership aims to provide Chief’s community of experienced women leaders with valuable insights from Wharton's renowned faculty. It will empower these women to further thrive in their fields. This move expands on Chief’s successful Executive Education membership program.

news.headline: Preterm Birth and PROM Testing market to hit USD 562.1 million by 2034, with a CAGR of 8.6%. Increasing demand due to rising preterm birth cases and advancing diagnostics. North America led in market share in 2023. Dynamic growth expected, driven by healthcare spending and personalized medicine trend.
news.summary: The preterm birth and PROM testing market was valued at US$ 227.8 million in 2023 and is projected to reach US$ 562.1 million by 2034, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.6%. Factors contributing to the market growth include the risk of preterm birth and PROM being increased by lifestyle factors like stress, obesity, smoking, and poor nutrition. Developing nations are increasing spending on healthcare, leading to the adoption of advanced diagnostic tools for prenatal care. Personalized medicine is gaining popularity, driving the need for advanced diagnostic tests. North America held the largest market share in 2023, with preterm birth tests and hospitals driving market growth. The increasing incidence of preterm births globally, attributed to various factors, is a key driver behind the market growth. Technological advancements in diagnostics are also boosting the market.

news.headline: EverC to hold second annual Safer Ecommerce Day on Nov 1, 2024 to educate on combatting online crimes.
news.summary: EverC, a leading provider of AI-powered risk intelligence for ecommerce businesses, has revealed the date for its upcoming event, Safer Ecommerce Day, scheduled for November 1, 2024. The event is designed to raise awareness and provide insights on combating illegal activities in the ecommerce sector to enhance safety measures. Safer Ecommerce Day will be a virtual event that brings together experts and thought leaders to address prevalent criminal strategies and global risks in ecommerce. Attendees can expect valuable discussions on ensuring a secure online retail environment.
